title: Simply Tensura Addon
description: Tensura Addon expands the Tensura mod with 7 new race lines featuring unique evolutions, 4 new skills, and full Iron's Spellbooks compatibility.
body:
# Races
**Angel**
+
Angel → Archangel → Seraphim → Divine Angel / Fallen Angel

**Frog**

Frog → Giant Frog → Poison Toad → Swamp Sovereign → Bog Ancient / Venom Lord → Frog Monarch

**Kitsune** (extends from beastfolk)

Kitsune → 3 Tailed Fox → 6 Tailed Fox → 9 Tailed Fox

**Fledgling**

Fledgling Bloodfiend → Kindred Bloodfiend → Blood Noble → Elder Bloodfiend → Progenitor Bloodfiend

**Djinn**

Whisper Djinn → Trickster Djinn → Phantom Djinn → Royal Djinn → Wishbound Djinn → Primordial Djinn → Ascended Djinn → Sovereign Djinn → Infinite Djinn → Omniversal Djinn

**Cursed Mariner** (extends from wight)

Cursed Mariner → Cursed Dreadnaught → Phantom Corsair → Davy Jones

**Monkey**

Monkey → Monkey Warrior → Monkey Martial Artist → Monkey King → Divine King → Sun Wukong

# Skills
**Angel Wings** (Extra)
Manifests ethereal wings. Unmastered: grants 60s of gliding on a 70s cooldown. Mastered: toggle on/off for permanent flight.

**Sharpened Claws** (Intrinsic)
Toggleable claws dealing 10 bonus unarmed damage, rising to 15 when mastered.

**Great Mage** (Unique)
Pinnacle magic mastery skill with 4 modes: conjure magic tomes/essences, analyze and steal skills from targets, and create enchantments. Passively boosts ability learning speed by 19%.

**Magic Scribe** (Extra — requires Iron's Spellbooks)
Inscribes a random spell scroll from the ether. Unmastered: level 1 scrolls, 30s cooldown. Mastered: random level scrolls, 10s cooldown.

# Iron's Spellbooks Compatibility (optional)
When Iron's Spellbooks is installed:

**Mana scaling** — Tensura's Magic Cost Multiplier attribute scales IS spell mana costs, making the two mana systems co-exist
**Race attribute bonuses** — Every Tensura race grants passive IS bonuses (max mana, mana regen, spell power, school affinities) that scale linearly from 1× at the starter stage up to 10× at the final evolution, rewarding progression through every race lin
